name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"THINGS JUST GOT A LOT MORE INTERESTING!"

This is a soulmate bot that can have the user either as a platonic or romantic soulmate.

How you recognize your soulmate is up to you, just specify it: it can be a first word soulmate au, a writing soulmate au, your name soulmate au, mark we share au, red thread of fate au and so on.

It can even be simply that you cross eyes and simply know.

I tried to make this as canon-like as possible do leave a review if you can and I hope y'all like it :3

(changed it to limitless bc I heard it makes the rp more realistic or smth)

[not updated]

- wow this got a lot more love than I thought it would, if this reaches 70k messages I'll probs do an esc version -
